tool_args.label: Enterprise Asset Management Consulting Services
tool_args.raw_text: Retainer contract award to 17 consulting firms to provide as-needed technical and management consulting services in support of MTA's Enterprise Asset Management (\"EAM\") Program.

payload.description: Competitive personal service retainer contract award to 17 consulting firms to provide as-needed technical and management consulting services in support of MTA's Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) Program. Zero-dollar basis with mini-RFP process. Seven years (Dec 2025-Nov 2032) plus three 1-year options (Dec 2033-Nov 2035). Total estimated value $135M.

tool_args.label: ARI Fleet Management Services Extension
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Headquarters is seeking Board approval to extend the miscellaneous service contract awarded to Automotive Rentals Inc. (\"ARI\") for Fleet Management Services

payload.description: Modification to extend Fleet Management Services contract with Automotive Rentals Inc. for eight months (through Aug 2, 2026) and add $15.7M in funding. Services include routine maintenance/repair for light/medium/heavy vehicles, roadside assistance, and towing across MTA territory for all operating agencies.

tool_args.label: OMNY CS POS Terminal Procurement
tool_args.raw_text: MTA HQ on behalf of NYC Transit, requests Board approval to modify the miscellaneous service contract awarded to Cubic Transportation Systems (\"Cubic\") in order to procure 30 Customer Service Point of Sale (\"CS POS\") devices

payload.project_name: OMNY Customer Service Point of Sale Terminal Procurement
payload.description: Modification to contract with Cubic Transportation Systems for New Fare Payment System (OMNY) to procure 30 Customer Service Point of Sale (CS POS) Terminals. 24 front office, 2 back office, 4 mobile. 26 Production, 4 Stage devices. Amount $1,364,510.

tool_args.label: MetroCard to OMNY transition
tool_args.raw_text: The devices will support increased station operations and customer service efforts related to the transition of remaining MetroCard customers to OMNY. This transition coincides with the planned discontinuation of all MetroCard sales, which is scheduled for December 31, 2025.

payload.claim_text: This purchase of additional CS POS devices was requested by NYC Transit. The devices will support increased station operations and customer service efforts related to the transition of remaining MetroCard customers to OMNY.
payload.statement: CS POS terminals support transition of MetroCard customers to OMNY, coinciding with planned MetroCard sales discontinuation on Dec 31, 2025

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.claim_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights (DDCR) has established 15 percent MBE, 15 percent WBE and 6 percent SDVOB goals on these contracts. DBE goals are not assigned to these contracts.

tool_args.label: EAM Program description
tool_args.raw_text: The EAM Program was initiated in 2014 to enable all levels of the organization to make more informed, transparent, and data-driven Capital and Operating decisions resulting in better utilization of MTA resources and lower the cost of maintaining system performance while improving operational safety and reliability.

payload.claim_text: The EAM Program was initiated in 2014 to enable all levels of the organization to make more informed, transparent, and data-driven Capital and Operating decisions resulting in better utilization of MTA resources and lower the cost of maintaining system performance while improving operational safety and reliability.
payload.description: Enterprise Asset Management Program purpose and origin
